attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.RECORD_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.STATUS, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.INTERFACE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.RULE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.MODEL_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTING_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TRANSACTION_CLASS, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CATEGORY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT1, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT2, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT3, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT4, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT5, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT6, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT7, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT8, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT9, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT10, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT11, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT12, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT13, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT14, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT15, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_DR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_CR,STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_EXCH_RATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_DR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_CR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_EXCH_RATE , STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.BATCH_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.MODEL_CTL_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TAX_REGISTRATION_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ROUNDING_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_ROUNDING_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_ACTIVITY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ICS_FLAG, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY,
 (
 select PROCESS_HISTORY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY
 minus
 select PROCESS_HISTORY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID = STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_PROCESS_HISTORY)
